text: I am drawn into a contemplative atmosphere, surrounded by glass and reflections, the distant glow of projected images and illuminated screens. Entering this innovative space with its embrace of research and development, I feel a subtle excitement, blended with a quiet introspection. The words on the wall about darkness and obscurity resonate deeply with me—inviting a moment of pause, to listen, ponder, and consider my place within this evolving, thoughtful environment. The world seems to slow down here, asking me to be present and attentive.
